title: TMC Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Security Guard Posts
description: The Tata Memorial Centre (TMC)has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the 02 vacancies for Security Guard Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass can use this chance and apply for the TMC Recruitment 202 6. Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
